methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs aligned to the merged internal-domain structure.
okrDesignPrinciples: The next quarter plan is framed to roll up into the same merged domain structure used by teams and product bricks.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Scale internal operating leverage across commercial, employee, and control workflows
companyObjectives.statement: Turn the merged internal-domain foundations into broader operating leverage without increasing fragmentation or trust risk.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps Q3 focused on scaling reuse and internal leverage across multiple value areas.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Reuse is the economic lever for enterprise platforms
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Frames reuse as the main scaling mechanism.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Leadership wants one operating truth because attention is scarce
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Anchors the objective in better operating visibility as the domain expands.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Chief Revenue Officer / VP Sales outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve seller productivity and forecast confidence through stronger commercial execution and cleaner operating data.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline established from current operating telemetry
keyResults.statement: Increase Forecast Accuracy during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve Forecast Accuracy through the team's owned workflow surfaces and product bricks.

supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR with platform, data, or domain capabilities relevant to Forecast Accuracy.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Pursue as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

target1.label: next quarter target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Forecast Accuracy moves materially in the right direction by next quarter.

target2.label: year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Forecast Accuracy sustains improvement through year end.
